Hero.parrafo: High-end lighting pieces sculpted from ancient reclaimed wood.
Hero.subParrafo: Timeless art and organic soul preserved in numbered pieces of exclusive design.

Garantias.g1Texto: Each work is delivered signed by the author with a physical document certifying its unique serial number and botanical species.
Garantias.g2Texto: We meticulously prepare high-protection technical packaging for each lamp, ensuring an impeccable presentation.
Garantias.g3Texto: Your piece is shipped with full insurance and personalized tracking. We take care of every detail until the piece is part of your home, ensuring complete security and peace of mind.

Manifiesto.p1: Our works begin far from commercial noise. We look for woods that have already lived: pieces sculpted by the sea on the coast, fallen branches in the forest, or remains from controlled and fully ethical pruning.
Manifiesto.p2: Each log or root begins a lethargy of months on our workbench to ensure its natural stability. Only then, through manual sanitation and components in solid brass and pure linen, do we release the latent light within its grain.

Encargos.titulo: Looking for a bespoke project or technical advice?
Encargos.texto: We work hand in hand with interior designers, architects, and private collectors to conceive exclusive pieces adapted to singular spaces.

Header.titulo: From the secret of nature to the warmth of the home
Header.descripcion: Each Veta & Lux lamp is not manufactured; it is listened to and released. We follow an honest, unhurried process that is deeply respectful of the cycles of time.

Fase1.p1: Our raw material does not come from commercial logging. We look for pieces with history: driftwood sculpted by the sea salt on the coast or fallen branches in ancient forests from controlled and fully legal pruning.
Fase1.p2: We seek woods that have already lived, paying special attention to their knots and scars. The video evokes the natural environment where each story is born.

Fase2.p1: Living wood retains moisture and tension. Upon arrival at the workshop, each piece begins a period of absolute rest that can last for months in our space.
Fase2.p2: They stabilize naturally, allowing the fiber to settle. It is an exercise in patience where we determine if the structure is fit to hold light and endure for generations.

Fase3.p1: We remove the weakened parts manually using planes and gouges, strictly respecting the healthy bark, textures, and stable cracks that give character to the piece.
Fase3.p2: We treat the wood using non-invasive techniques and apply texturized organic oils by hand up to a 1000 grain, nourishing the pore without hiding the pure, marble-like feel of the wood.

Fase4.p1: A premium lamp requires impeccable electronics. We design hidden internal channels down to the millimeter so as not to alter the organic aesthetics of the log.
Fase4.p2: We exclusively use cables with subtle natural linen or textile cotton sheaths, solid brass lamp holders, and electrical systems that comply with the strictest European safety standards.

Cierre.cita: "We do not create two identical pieces because nature never repeats the same stroke. Bringing one of our lamps into your space is adopting a fragment of suspended time."

Coleccion.descripcion: Table lamps, beams, and log pieces with warm light. Each reference is handcrafted; click an image to enter its full profile with gallery, care instructions, and detailed zoom.

listaEspera.texto: Reservations for unique pieces typically remain active for a maximum of 48 hours awaiting payment. If you wish to join the priority waiting list in case it becomes available again, or if you prefer us to find a similar wood in the workshop for you, write to us directly.

whatsapp.reservado: Hello! I saw the lamp "{nombre}" on the website and I see it is reserved. Could we talk about ordering a similar piece from the workshop?
whatsapp.vendido: Hello! I loved the lamp "{nombre}" but I see it is already sold out. Is it possible to make a custom project inspired by it?

Contacto.descripcion: Would you like a custom piece, have questions about shipping, or want to drop by the workshop? Write to us: we reply with the same calm with which we work the wood.

taller.texto: Visits by appointment only to discover the process and see available pieces.

email.texto: Orders, custom requests, and general inquiries.

whatsapp.texto: Quick assistance for immediate questions or live stock inquiries.

Footer.descripcion: Handcrafted lighting with reclaimed wood. Each piece is unique, sustainable, and handmade.

Carrito.descripcion: Review your pieces, enter your delivery details, and select your payment method. The value of each work includes custom high-protection artisanal packaging. We offer complimentary insured shipping to the Peninsula and optimized rates with full coverage for the Islands and Europe. If you have any questions, please contact us directly.

CarritoClient.alert_campos: Please fill in all required fields.

Cookies.intro1: At Veta & Lux, we respect the privacy of your digital environment. To offer you a fluid, sophisticated browsing experience adapted to your aesthetic preferences, this website uses information storage technologies called cookies.
Cookies.intro2: Below, we detail what these technologies are, the exclusive purposes for which we use them in our digital workshop, and how you can manage or restrict them at any time through your browser settings.
Cookies.seccion1_texto: A cookie is a small text file that is downloaded automatically to your device (computer, smartphone, or tablet) when you access the vast majority of websites. They allow a site, among other things, to store and retrieve information about a user's browsing habits to recognize them and offer an optimal and personalized service.
Cookies.seccion2_titulo: 2. Types of Cookies Used at Veta & Lux
Cookies.seccion2_intro: This website only activates essential technological tools and respectful analysis to maintain the proper functioning of the exhibition and sales space:
Cookies.tipoA_texto: These are essential to allow you to browse our lighting collection, interact with the Sanity panel in real-time, view real stock, and maintain the integrity of the contact or booking process via WhatsApp. They do not collect confidential information and are not used for commercial purposes.
Cookies.tipoB_texto: Processed anonymously by us or third parties (such as Google Analytics), these allow us to quantify the number of people who appreciate our pieces and perform statistical measurements of how visitors use the portal with the sole purpose of improving technical fluidity and catalog design.
Cookies.seccion3_texto1: You can allow, block, or delete cookies installed on your equipment by configuring the browser options used on your device. However, please note that if you block all technical cookies, some gallery functionalities (such as real-time stock synchronization) may not behave with the usual fluidity.
Cookies.seccion3_texto2: You can consult the specific privacy manuals for major browsers in the settings menus of Google Chrome, Apple Safari, Mozilla Firefox, or Microsoft Edge.
Cookies.seccion4_texto: We may update our website's Cookie Policy to adapt it to new regulations or technical needs derived from the incorporation of new artisans or premium payment gateways. We recommend reviewing this section periodically if you wish to stay fully informed about how we protect your browsing.

AvisoLegal.intro: In compliance with Article 10 of Law 34/2002, of July 11, on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE), the identifying data of the owner of this website dedicated to high-end lighting craftsmanship are set out below.
AvisoLegal.s2_p1: The design of the portal and its source codes, as well as the logos, trademarks, texts, photographs, and designs of the artisan lamps displayed, belong to Veta & Lux or their respective authors and are protected by the corresponding intellectual and industrial property rights.
AvisoLegal.s2_p2: The reproduction, exploitation, distribution, or commercialization of any content on this website, as well as the workshop's own sculptural designs, is strictly prohibited without prior written authorization from Veta & Lux management.
AvisoLegal.s3_p1: Veta & Lux is not responsible for damages of any kind that may be caused by errors or omissions in the content, lack of availability of the portal, or the transmission of malicious programs, despite having adopted all necessary premium technological measures to prevent it.
AvisoLegal.s3_p2: Given the unique and organic nature of the pieces sold (artisanally treated precious wood), the images and technical information approximate the reality of the work as accurately as possible, although each lamp presents exclusive knots, grains, and nuances inherent to its sculptural condition.
AvisoLegal.s4_p1: In the event that this website contains links or hyperlinks to other Internet sites, Veta & Lux will not exercise any control over such sites and content. Under no circumstances will it assume any responsibility for the content of any link belonging to an external website.
AvisoLegal.s5_p1: For the resolution of all disputes or questions related to this website or the activities carried out therein, Spanish legislation shall apply, to which the parties expressly submit. The Courts and Tribunals closest to the workshop's registered office shall be competent to resolve all conflicts derived from or related to its use.

EnviosDevoluciones.b1_texto: Each lamp in our collection is an unrepeatable wood and light sculpture. Therefore, the packaging process is done by hand in our own workshop, using custom-made high-resistance boxes and sustainable internal protections that ensure the piece travels suspended and totally isolated from impacts.
EnviosDevoluciones.b2_texto: We work exclusively with premium transport agencies with real-time tracking service and signature delivery. We want the experience to be impeccable from the moment the piece leaves the workshop until it illuminates your home.
EnviosDevoluciones.tab_es_info: Complimentary shipping (Free) — Delivery in 24/48 business hours.
EnviosDevoluciones.tab_ue_info: Fee calculated at checkout — Delivery in 3-5 business days.
EnviosDevoluciones.tab_nota: * For international shipments outside the EU or islands, please contact us directly through our workshop.
EnviosDevoluciones.b3_p1: We understand that art and design need to be experienced in their final space. If, once placed in your room, you feel the piece does not dialogue perfectly with the surroundings, you have a period of 14 calendar days from receipt to request a return.
EnviosDevoluciones.b3_p2: The piece must be sent back in its original high-security packaging to ensure it does not suffer damage during transport. Once received and inspected at the workshop, we will refund the full amount using the same payment method.
EnviosDevoluciones.nota_medida_texto: Lamps created under custom order, adapting specific dimensions or woods selected expressly for a project, do not admit standard returns as they are exclusive works co-created for the client. Naturally, any transport incident is immediately covered by the workshop.
EnviosDevoluciones.duda: Do you have any questions about the suitability of a piece or its transport?
